_comment: Config for scripts/okf-prompt-lookup.py. Override via env vars: OKF_LOOKUP_<KEY>=<value>. e.g. OKF_LOOKUP_LIMIT=5
_limit_comment: Top-N hits to print. Default 3. Set 0 to print all matches.
_min_token_length_comment: Tokens shorter than this are stripped before scoring. Default 3.
_min_score_comment: Lines scoring below this are skipped. Default 1 (any match). Raise to 2-3 to demand stronger matches.
_max_line_preview_comment: Trim shown index.md line to this many chars in output. Default 120.
_index_path_comment: Path to the OKF index, relative to repo root. Override with an absolute path or different file (e.g. a per-app index).
_format_comment: Output format: 'reminder' = bulleted system-message block; 'paths' = one path per line.
_extra_stopwords_comment: Additional tokens to exclude from scoring. Useful for repo-specific noise. Merges with built-in stopword list.
_domain_stopwords_enabled_comment: Whether to strip oriz-specific stopwords ('oriz', 'knowledge', 'agent', 'rule', 'file', 'repo'). Disable if forking for non-oriz use.
_include_glossary_comment: If false, paths under knowledge/glossary/ are dropped from results. Glossary matches often crowd out concept files.
_boost_runbooks_comment: If true, runbook hits get +1 score (favours actionable knowledge over reference). Off by default.
